known_gaps: The op-amp headphone buffer seed has placeholder connector protection for required output DC blocking and protection.
Fabrication-candidate component evidence is intentionally unavailable for the amplifier seed, so optional KiCad-backed runs must fail closed before claiming ERC/DRC-ready analog output.
Amplifier-specific layout proof for feedback proximity, supply decoupling, high-current output width, thermal placement, and headphone load safety remains future work.
notes: Optional amplifier fixture that documents the expected fabrication-candidate blockers for real kicad-cli validation promotion.
